# Banana bread

From: Colleen
Linked: [[banana-bread-notes]]

## Ingredients
- 3 ripe bananas
- King Arthur flour
- Walnuts

## Notes
- Bake at 350 for an hour

# Corn chowder

From: Colleen
Linked: [[corn-chowder-notes]]

## Ingredients
- Sweet corn
- Yukon potatoes
- Cream

## Notes
- Simmer until tender

# Log Cabin block

From: Colleen
Linked: [[log-cabin-block-notes]]

## Pattern
- Center square
- Build out the strips
- Press toward the light side

## Notes
- Try in fall colors

# Flying Geese block

From: Colleen
Linked: [[flying-geese-block-notes]]

## Pattern
- One large triangle
- Two small triangles
- Trim to size

## Notes
- Good for borders

# King Arthur bread

## Notes
- Started this from the King Arthur recipe card.
- Ideas to revisit:
  - Overnight rise
  - Crustier loaf

# Half-square triangles

## Notes
- Started this block medley for the guild class.
- Ideas to revisit:
  - Pinwheel layout
  - Scrappy version

# Zucchini bread

## Notes
- Started this from the church bake-sale recipe.
- Ideas to revisit:
  - Add walnuts
  - Less sugar

- Captured on 2025-12-27.
- Status: idea — revisit on Sunday.
